name: Glarner Kantonalbank
summary: Glarner Kantonalbank provides various banking products and services for private and corporate customers primarily in the Canton of Glarus and neighboring economic area. It offers mortgage and savings, finance/loans, credit, investment and asset management, trade, online products, cards, and safe boxes, as well as e-banking and mobile banking services. The company was founded in 1884 and is based in Glarus, Switzerland.
